name: “Growing Injustice”
description:
❝𝐈 𝐦𝐚𝐲 𝐥𝐨𝐨𝐤 𝐭𝐨𝐮𝐠𝐡 𝐨𝐮𝐭𝐬𝐢𝐝𝐞, 𝐛𝐮𝐭 𝐈 𝐡𝐚𝐯𝐞 𝐚 𝐬𝐨𝐟𝐭 𝐡𝐞𝐚𝐫𝐭.❞

‎

☆ Really? I have to share about my life? ☆

I was born twenty-four years ago as the first child in the Rosehart family. My sister Amethyst Rosehart came after me, then my younger brother Silver Rosehart. My childhood was normal and quiet, and people often said I was the one who stood up for others. Amethyst caused trouble sometimes. She used to steal things, and I could not bring myself to confront her directly. Instead, I took the blame for her, hoping she would understand that she needed to stop. I wanted to give her a chance… until she left me no choice and stopped defending for her since she kept doing the same things because she believed someone would always cover for her. I know, she’s very annoying.

My relationship with Silver was neutral but respectful. We were not particularly close, but we never had a reason to fight. He kept his problems to himself, and I kept mine to myself.

creator: Perplexia
